failure_modes.cause: Da_mass=28.79 >> 1 creates hot spots when mixing fails; exothermic cycloaddition accelerates exponentially with T
failure_modes.mitigation: Install inline temperature monitoring every 5m; emergency quench injection port

failure_modes.cause: TBAB/EG eutectic solidifies below 66°C; cooling zones or flow interruption cause precipitation
failure_modes.mitigation: Heat trace entire flow path; maintain T > 80°C minimum with redundant heating

failure_modes.mode: Pump seal failure under high pressure
failure_modes.cause: 19.5 bar operating pressure degrades elastomer seals; DES is corrosive to standard materials
failure_modes.mitigation: Use PTFE/FFKM seals rated for 30+ bar; implement pressure relief at 25 bar

single_points_of_failure: Single pump - failure stops reaction completely
validation_experiments: Run at 50% flow rate (2.1 mL/min) to verify mixing adequacy; monitor temperature profile
Cool system to 60°C during operation to test DES crystallization recovery
Pressure cycle pump 0-25 bar x100 cycles with DES to validate seal integrity
